revision.comment: use AWB to add navy variant
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = The Bahamas | shortname alias = Bahamas | flag alias = Flag of the Bahamas.svg | flag alias-colonial = Flag of the Bahamas (1953–1964).svg | flag alias-1869 = Flag of the Bahamas (1869–1904).svg | flag alias-1904 = Flag of the Bahamas (1904–1923).svg | flag alias-1923 = Flag of the Bahamas (1923–1953).svg | flag alias-1953 = Flag of the Bahamas (1953–1964).svg | flag alias-1964 = Flag of the Bahamas (1964–1973).svg | flag alias-army = Flag of the Bahamas.svg | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of the Bahamas.svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of the Bahamas.svg | link alias-army = Royal Bahamas Defence Force | link alias-naval = Royal Bahamas Defence Force | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of the Bahamas.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Bahamas Defence Force | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = colonial | var2 = 1869 | var3 = 1904 | var4 = 1923 | var5 = 1953 | var6 = 1964 | var7 = civil | redir1 = BHS | redir2 = BAH | redir3 = The Bahamas </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
